hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验；【FINANCE】美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者；【CRYPTO】人工智能暴露了顶级加密网络的巨大缺陷，专家警告银行可能是下一个。

items.title: Hot jobs report puts Fed cuts further out of reach as Chair Warsh faces policy tests
items.summary: Another big jobs report in May has swept aside the possibility of interest rate cuts anytime soon.
items.title_zh: 热点就业报告显示美联储进一步降息遥不可及，主席沃什面临政策考验
items.summary_zh: 五月份的另一份重要就业报告排除了近期降息的可能性。

items.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including 'Project 2025' author
items.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in the conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者
items.summary_zh: 新任美联储主席已经任命了他的第一批人选。其中一人在保守派政策蓝图“2025 年计划”中撰写了美联储章节。

items.title: AI exposed a massive flaw in top crypto network and experts warn banks could be next
items.summary: After an AI model helped uncover a four-year-old flaw in Zcash, security researchers warn that similar bugs may be hiding across crypto and traditional financial systems.
items.title_zh: 人工智能暴露了顶级加密网络的巨大缺陷，专家警告银行可能是下一个
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能模型帮助发现 Zcash 中存在四年的缺陷后，安全研究人员警告说，类似的缺陷可能隐藏在加密货币和传统金融系统中。

items.title: Bitcoin loses $60,000, falls to weakest price since October 2024
items.summary: Several headwinds converged over bitcoin recently as its largest buyer turned seller, ETF investors headed for the exits, and rate-hike fears rose.
items.title_zh: 比特币下跌 60,000 美元，跌至 2024 年 10 月以来最低价格
items.summary_zh: 最近，随着比特币最大买家变成卖家、ETF 投资者纷纷退出、加息担忧加剧，比特币面临着一些不利因素。

items.title: Where investors may find the next 'big wave' for AI trade
items.summary: Tim Urbanowicz, chief investment strategist at Innovator from Goldman Sachs Asset Management, tackles the AI boom.
items.title_zh: 投资者可能会在哪里找到人工智能贸易的下一个“大浪潮”
items.summary_zh: 高盛资产管理公司 Innovator 首席投资策略师 Tim Urbanowicz 应对人工智能热潮。

items.title: Cardano social activity surges as ADA falls under 20 cents to four-year lows
items.summary: Santiment data show active addresses at a four-month high and social dominance near a 2026 peak after Charles Hoskinson warned of a "wave of failures" in the ecosystem.
items.title_zh: ADA 跌破 20 美分至四年来新低，卡尔达诺社交活动激增
items.summary_zh: Santiment 数据显示，在 Charles Hoskinson 警告生态系统出现“一波失败”后，活跃地址达到四个月新高，社会主导地位接近 2026 年峰值。

items.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
items.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何围绕人工智能代理重新设计软件交付
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 来加速软件交付、自动化工作流程并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。

items.title: Strategy’s Saylor says Bitcoin should avoid choosing between ‘purity and adoption’ as BTC extends losses
items.summary: Strategy Exec Chairman Michael Saylor divided the Bitcoin ecosystem into four camps, saying that each serves a necessary role.
items.title_zh: Strategy 的 Saylor 表示，随着 BTC 损失扩大，比特币应该避免在“纯度和采用”之间做出选择
items.summary_zh: Strategy Exec主席Michael Saylor将比特币生态系统分为四个阵营，并表示每个阵营都发挥着必要的作用。

items.title: Morgan Stanley lets clients lend bitcoin and other assets for in-kind spot crypto ETF conversions
items.summary: Morgan Stanley Wealth Management and Galaxy Digital have partnered to let eligible clients lend crypto in exchange for crypto ETP shares.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利允许客户借出比特币和其他资产进行实物现货加密 ETF 转换
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利财富管理公司和 Galaxy Digital 合作，让符合条件的客户借出加密货币以换取加密货币 ETP 股票。

items.title: Bitcoin, ether ETFs end 13- and 17-day outflow streaks as traders rotate into equity perps ahead of NFP: analysts
items.summary: Bitcoin ETFs ended a 13-day outflow streak with $3M inflows, and ETH ETFs snapped a 17-day run ahead of NFP as traders rotate to equity perps.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，随着交易员在非农就业数据公布之前转向股票永续投资，比特币、以太坊 ETF 结束了连续 13 天和 17 天的资金流出
items.summary_zh: 比特币 ETF 结束了 13 天的连续流出，资金流入达 300 万美元，随着交易员转向股票永续债券，ETH ETF 结束了领先于非农就业数据 17 天的走势。

items.title: Morgan Stanley will soon open its trillion-dollar wealth management funnel to AI agents
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利即将向人工智能代理开放万亿美元财富管理渠道
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利的举动是华尔街主要银行向外部人工智能工具开放其平台的最早实例之一。

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes in Gulf in latest test of ceasefire
items.summary: The US military says it struck Iranian drones and radar sites. Tehran responds by targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在海湾地区交锋，这是对停火的最新考验
items.summary_zh: 美国军方称袭击了伊朗无人机和雷达站。德黑兰的回应是瞄准美国在科威特和巴林的基地。

items.title: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
items.summary: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.
items.title_zh: 普京表示，就结束乌克兰战争问题与泽伦斯基会面“毫无意义”
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯总统拒绝之前，乌克兰总统写了一封公开信，呼吁进行面对面会谈。

items.title: Iran's football team granted visas to enter US for World Cup, officials say
items.summary: The approval comes just 10 days before the Iranian squad's opening match against New Zealand in Los Angeles.
items.title_zh: 官员称伊朗足球队已获得进入美国观看世界杯的签证
items.summary_zh: 这一批准是在伊朗队在洛杉矶对阵新西兰队的首场比赛前十天获得的。

items.title: Canada bans Texas cattle over flesh-eating screwworm outbreak in US
items.summary: The ban came as a second infected calf was identified in Texas, and the US state declaring a state of disaster over the outbreak.
items.title_zh: 加拿大因美国爆发食肉螺旋虫而禁止饲养德克萨斯州牛
items.summary_zh: 这项禁令出台之际，得克萨斯州发现了第二只受感染的小牛，美国该州宣布疫情爆发进入灾难状态。

items.title: Palestinian baby killed by Israeli gunfire in West Bank, health ministry says
items.summary: The Israeli military says Friday's "incident is under review", expressing "deep sorrow for any harm caused".
items.title_zh: 卫生部称巴勒斯坦婴儿在约旦河西岸被以色列枪杀
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方表示，周五的“事件正在接受审查”，并对“造成的任何伤害深表悲痛”。

items.title: Hopes of Lebanon Cease-Fire Falter as Israel and Hezbollah Fight On
items.summary: The U.S.-brokered agreement requires Hezbollah, which Iran backs, to stop firing first. But the group, not party to the talks, rejected the conditions as a virtual surrender.
items.title_zh: 随着以色列和真主党的战斗，黎巴嫩停火的希望变得渺茫
items.summary_zh: 美国斡旋达成的协议要求伊朗支持的真主党首先停止开火。但该组织并非谈判方，拒绝了这些条件，视为实质投降。

items.title: Backed by Trump, Opposed by Putin, and Fighting for His Political Life
items.summary: Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan of Armenia is seeking re-election as his country weighs questions of war and peace, of autocracy and democracy, and of subjugation and independence.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持，普京反对，为自己的政治生命而奋斗
items.summary_zh: 亚美尼亚总理尼科尔·帕希尼扬正在寻求连任，因为该国正在权衡战争与和平、独裁与民主、征服与独立等问题。

items.title: A Question Swirling Around Putin’s Big Conference: Could the War End?
items.summary: At the St. Petersburg economic forum, business and political elites said Russia faced a choice of halting the conflict or sacrificing more. Vladimir Putin seemed to signal more war.
items.title_zh: 围绕普京大型会议的一个问题：战争能结束吗？
items.summary_zh: 在圣彼得堡经济论坛上，商界和政治精英表示，俄罗斯面临着停止冲突或做出更多牺牲的选择。弗拉基米尔·普京似乎发出了更多战争的信号。

items.title: XRP falls toward $1.10 as liquidation-driven selloff pushes token to multi-month lows
items.summary: XRP lost another 5% after a high-volume breakdown overwhelmed support near $1.20, leaving traders focused on whether the latest washout marks capitulation or the start of a deeper slide.
items.title_zh: 由于清算驱动的抛售将代币推至数月低点，XRP 跌向 1.10 美元
items.summary_zh: 在高成交量突破 1.20 美元附近的支撑位后，XRP 又下跌 5%，这让交易者关注最新的下跌是否标志着投降，还是更深层次下滑的开始。

items.title: Hyperliquid treasuries stand alone in profit as legacy crypto DATs bleed billions
items.summary: Strategy, Bitmine, and other major treasury firms have seen paper gains evaporate as crypto prices continue sliding.
items.title_zh: 随着传统加密货币 DAT 损失数十亿美元，超流动性国债在利润方面独树一帜
items.summary_zh: 随着加密货币价格持续下滑，Strategy、Bitmine 和其他主要财务公司的账面收益蒸发了。

items.title: CME CEO Duffy says new perpetual futures could be ‘disaster waiting to happen’
items.summary: CME CEO Terry Duffy warned that U.S.-approved perpetual futures risk retail blowouts and excessive leverage exposure.
items.title_zh: 芝商所首席执行官达菲表示，新的永续期货可能是“等待发生的灾难”
items.summary_zh: 芝商所首席执行官特里·达菲（Terry Duffy）警告称，美国批准的永续期货面临散户井喷和过度杠杆敞口的风险。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #16.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 16。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Solana (SOL)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #7.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Solana (SOL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第七。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #114.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 114。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Sui (SUI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #33.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Sui (SUI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 33 位。

items.title: A blueprint for democratic governance of frontier AI
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a blueprint for U.S. governance of frontier AI, proposing a federal framework for safety, resilience, and national security.
items.title_zh: 前沿人工智能民主治理蓝图
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 勾勒出美国前沿人工智能治理的蓝图，提出了安全、弹性和国家安全的联邦框架。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: MIT researchers teach AI models to interpret charts
items.summary: The new ChartNet training dataset could improve the accuracy of vision-language models that help analyze business trends or interpret scientific figures.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员教人工智能模型解释图表
items.summary_zh: 新的 ChartNet 训练数据集可以提高视觉语言模型的准确性，帮助分析业务趋势或解释科学数据。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Bitcoin set to slump to new lows for 2026 after recent sell-off, traders forecast
items.summary: The cryptocurrency is likely to break below its lows hit in early February, traders on prediction market Kalshi believe.
items.title_zh: 交易员预测，在最近的抛售之后，比特币将在 2026 年跌至新低
items.summary_zh: 预测市场 Kalshi 的交易员认为，加密货币可能会跌破 2 月初触及的低点。

items.title: Bitcoin back above $61,000 after rout leads to $1.6 billion liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin fell as low as $59,227 overnight before recovering, steadying after Friday's strong jobs report set off a selloff that sank the Nasdaq 100 about 5% and rattled stocks, bonds and crypto together.
items.title_zh: 暴跌导致 16 亿美元清算后，比特币重回 61,000 美元上方
items.summary_zh: 比特币隔夜跌至 59,227 美元，随后回升，在周五强劲的就业报告引发抛售、纳斯达克 100 指数下跌约 5% 并震动股票、债券和加密货币后企稳。

items.title: Why diehard bitcoin purists aren’t sweating the massive price crash that wiped out $200 billion
items.summary: Mati Greenspan, Michael Saylor and Jameson Lopp blamed the AI boom for draining capital from bitcoin. Meanwhile, Jack Mallers refrained from sharing an outlook but recommended buying the dip.
items.title_zh: 为什么顽固的比特币纯粹主义者没有为导致 2000 亿美元损失的大规模价格暴跌而担忧
items.summary_zh: 马蒂·格林斯潘（Mati Greenspan）、迈克尔·塞勒（Michael Saylor）和詹姆森·洛普（Jameson Lopp）指责人工智能的繁荣导致了比特币资本的流失。与此同时，杰克·马勒斯(Jack Mallers)没有分享前景，但建议逢低买入。

items.title: Memecoins dogecoin, shiba inu dive 9% as bitcoin nears $60,000
items.summary: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu led losses among major tokens as heavy volume and liquidations overwhelmed support levels, extending a broader risk-off move across crypto markets.
items.title_zh: 比特币逼近 60,000 美元，Memecoins 狗狗币、柴犬币暴跌 9%
items.summary_zh: 狗狗币和柴犬在主要代币中领跌，因为成交量和清算超过了支撑位，扩大了整个加密货币市场的避险走势。

items.title: Crypto Council for Innovation launches coalition to push for regulatory clarity on vaults
items.summary: A new coalition is forming, focused on crypto vaults, an increasingly popular mechanism for depositing digital assets and earning yield.
items.title_zh: 加密货币创新委员会成立联盟，推动金库监管明确化
items.summary_zh: 一个新的联盟正在形成，专注于加密金库，这是一种越来越流行的存储数字资产和赚取收益的机制。

items.title: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind
items.summary: GPT-Rosalind advances life sciences research with enhanced biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.
items.title_zh: 向 GPT-Rosalind 引入新功能
items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 通过增强的生物推理、药物化学专业知识、基因组学分析和实验工作流程功能推进生命科学研究。

items.title: Thousand Token Wood: shipping a multi-agent economy on a 3B model
items.title_zh: 千代木：在 3B 模型上实现多主体经济

items.title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
items.title_zh: Mellum2 简介：JetBrains 的 12B 专家混合模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery

items.title: Kalshi is building a prediction markets 'Bloomberg Terminal' for high-end traders, source says
items.summary: The prediction market platform is developing the platform to create a singular platform for its highly engaged traders.

items.title: Traders say Karen Bass and Spencer Pratt will advance to runoff in high-profile LA mayoral race
items.summary: Los Angeles voters go to the polls Tuesday. If no candidate receives more than 50%, the top-two vote getters will advance to a November runoff.
items.title_zh: 交易员称凯伦·巴斯和斯宾塞·普拉特将在备受瞩目的洛杉矶市长竞选中晋级决选

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions

items.title: Polymarket closes its first block trade as prediction markets push for Wall Street adoption

items.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down

items.summary_zh: 在长途跋涉 50 多公里（30 英里）穿越沙漠向当局报警后，只有两人幸存。

items.title: Laboring Under Delhi’s Harsh Heat, Workers Must Choose Health or Wages

items.title: The Gold Mines at the Heart of This Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: Mining has been the lifeblood of this remote Congolese hill town for decades. Now, it is fueling the spread of a devastating virus.
items.title_zh: 埃博拉疫情中心的金矿

items.title: Former Prince Andrew Sublet Cottages on Royal Property Where He Lived Rent-Free
